content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.95%, Bank Nifty -0.97%, VIX +7.84% to 18.16 — broad risk-off with pharma/IT as relative outperformers. Multiple binary events tomorrow (DRREDDY, CIPLA Q4 May 12; CPI print). Existing book has 11 CNC positions consuming 45% capital; priority is protecting COFORGE's +9.2% gain and managing the rest, not adding risk into a VIX spike.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.2%, CMP 123.39 vs SL 121.00 (1.9% buffer). Gold defensive in high-VIX environment; thesis intact. SL is below entry and trailing further would breach 1% trail-gap. Hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 828.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.6%, CMP 839.95. Current SL 828 already above entry 820 (breakeven+). CMP-SL gap = 1.42%, meets the 1.0% trail-gap floor. No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD logic. Actually, stored SL already at 828 — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +9.2%, CMP 1372.50. Current SL 1357.20 is only 1.11% below CMP — within trail-gap floor but tight. Q4 blockbuster (+134% YoY PAT), Sabre deal ramp intact, bullish modifier +0.07. Pulling SL slightly to 1340 (2.37% gap from CMP) gives more room for normal intraday chop while still locking in +6.4% gain. Target 1420 unchanged — Axis TP 1690 supports leaving room to run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1590.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.7%, CMP 1630.60. Stored SL 1630 is essentially AT CMP — this is the self-stopout failure mode from Rule (c). Loosening SL is NOT permitted by guardrails on a long. So the choice is EXIT or accept stopout. Pharma sector +0.59% today, sector strength; thesis (Miqnaf, Zaynich novel drugs, FY26 turnaround) intact. The SL was placed too tight at entry. Since MODIFY can only TIGHTEN, I cannot loosen 1630 to 1590. Switching to HOLD — accept that SL is at risk but thesis is intact, position is +0.7%. Actually re-reading: 1590 < 1630, so this is LOOSENING and will be rejected. Changing to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.3%, CMP 2795.70 vs SL 2760 (1.28% buffer). Bullish modifier +0.04, Q4 PAT Rs 582 cr (+11% YoY), Refrigerants project doubled to Rs 2,300 cr. Chemicals sector chop noted but SRF differentiated. Hold to SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.4%, CMP 9053 vs SL 8950 (1.14% buffer). Q4 record revenue, FMEG +47%, Rs 4,190 cr net cash. Bullish modifier +0.05. Position within normal noise band; SL placed at entry-time has not been threatened. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.7%, CMP 10579.50 vs SL 10440 (1.32% buffer). Buyback at 12,000 (~13% premium to CMP) provides hard price floor. Auto sector weak today but Bajaj relative strength (-0.24% vs sector -1.49%). Thesis (Q4 +34% standalone, Rs 5,633 cr buyback, record date May 29) intact. Hold within SL band — buyback floor is the anchor."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.5%, CMP 478.45 vs SL 468 (2.18% buffer). FY27 guidance raised, FMCG defensive. Volume growth lagged peers (Marico/GCPL) but thesis not broken. SL has 2%+ room — let it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1250.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +3.6%, CMP 1271.50. Stored SL already at 1250 (1.69% below CMP, above entry 1226 — locked in breakeven+). Neutral modifier -0.03 (valuation rich, 70x P/E). No-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -1.9%, CMP 1223.90 vs SL 1198 (2.16% buffer). Q4 PAT +21% YoY, India volume +16% (best in FMCG), bullish modifier +0.12. Bought at 1248 near intraday high earlier; faded but within SL band. Thesis intact, let SL absorb noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.6%, CMP 866.70 vs SL 850 (1.96% buffer). Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY at Rs 17,107 cr, all-time high zone. Bullish modifier +0.05. SL has adequate room; not trailing yet — let position prove out before tightening."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HFCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "MIS",
      "reasoning": "Pending MIS LIMIT BUY @ 133.50 from 7615 minutes ago (>5 days stale, must be from a prior session — flagging as data anomaly). Cannot CANCEL via this schema. Will not stack additional HFCL orders."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 has 1.9% buffer below CMP 123.39. Trailing further would violate 1% gap discipline since position is at loss. Wait."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 828 already above entry 820 (breakeven+1%); 1.42% gap to CMP 839.95 — fine. No further trail needed yet."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1340.00,
      "reasoning": "Pulling SL slightly down from 1357.20 to 1340 to widen trail-gap from 1.11% to 2.37% — but wait, this LOOSENS SL on a long and will be rejected. Correcting: keep SL at 1357.20 (HOLD); the tight gap is acceptable given +9.2% unrealized and binary CPI/earnings cluster tomorrow argues for protection, not loosening. Changing to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1630 essentially at CMP 1630.60 — cannot loosen (guardrail blocks). Thesis intact (bullish modifier +0.06, pharma sector outperforming). Accept SL placement and let it ride; if stopped, that's the entry-time risk budget firing as designed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "1.28% SL buffer adequate; chemicals chop noted but SRF differentiated."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "1.14% SL buffer, position -0.4%, within normal noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Buyback at 12,000 provides hard floor; 1.32% SL buffer adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "2.18% SL buffer, defensive FMCG; let SL absorb noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1250 already above entry 1226 (breakeven+2%); 1.69% gap to CMP. No further trail needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "2.16% SL buffer; Q4 strong, bullish modifier +0.12, thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "1.96% SL buffer; near 52w high, order book strong. Not trailing yet."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "DELIBERATE PASS on new entries this tick despite multiple BULLISH candidates (MCX +0.10, BAJAJ-AUTO +0.10 — already held, IDEA +0.08, COFORGE +0.07 — already held, WOCKPHARMA +0.06 — already held, MARICO +0.05 — already held, CGPOWER +0.05 — already held, POLYCAB +0.05 — already held, SRF +0.04 — already held). Rejecting MCX (P/B 27.73x, all-time high zone, extended +5% today — risk-reward poor at this entry). Rejecting IDEA (penny-stock at 11.91, ASM/GSM-adjacent retail concentration risk per Rule 6). Rejecting TATACONSUM as add (already held at higher cost, would be averaging into loss). Rejecting CIPLA (BEARISH modifier -0.12, 2-year low, Q4 May 13 binary — Rule 11 disqualifies new entry within 3 sessions of binary). Rejecting LAURUSLABS add (NEUTRAL -0.03, rich valuation). NIFTYBEES not adding — already broad-market exposed via 11-name book. Rule 18 check: deployment 45%, candidates explicitly evaluated by name above. Holding admit book today on account of VIX +7.84% spike AND tomorrow's CPI+pharma earnings binary cluster — this is a fact-based risk-off case, not anchoring. Will re-evaluate post-CPI tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Capital 45% deployed across 11 CNC names, well-diversified across FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM), IT (COFORGE), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA, LAURUSLABS), Chemicals (SRF), Capital Goods (POLYCAB, CGPOWER), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO), defensive (GOLDBEES). VIX spike + tomorrow's binary cluster (CPI + DRREDDY/CIPLA Q4 read-across) argues against new admits; existing book carries the bullish exposure. Net unrealized +3,359 with COFORGE +9.2% as the main winner — its SL at 1357 (1.11% below CMP) is tight but appropriate given binary tomorrow. Daily loss limit 75,309 INR fully intact. Stale HFCL MIS pending order from prior session flagged for review."
}
